name: STEP_FUNCTION
description: Step function signal generator - creates a step change at a specified time

internalStructure.description: SuperBlock containing STEP block for generating step signals

xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="STEP_FUNCTION" blockType="c" simulationFunctionName="csuper" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="STEP_FUNCTION">
  <SuperBlockDiagram as="child">
    <mxGraphModel as="model">
      <root>
        <BasicBlock id="step" interfaceFunctionName="STEP" blockType="c">
          <ScilabString as="exprs" height="3" width="1">
            <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
            <data line="1" column="0" value="0"/>
            <data line="2" column="0" value="1"/>
          </ScilabString>
        </BasicBlock>
        <ExplicitOutBlock id="out" interfaceFunctionName="OUT_f"/>
      </root>
    </mxGraphModel>
  </SuperBlockDiagram>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="50.0" y="50.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: SuperBlock - contains internal STEP and OUT_f blocks
No direct parameters - configure via internal STEP block
Has internal ControlPort and CommandPort for event triggering
criticalRules: Configure step parameters: initial, time, final
Internal STEP block has ControlPort for activation
Output is the explicit signal from internal OUT_f
